title: Dimensional Totems
description: Totems' eye colors change across dimensions
body: ### Description Gives every totem, whether dropped or in an inventory, different eyes depending on what dimension the player is in. ### Versions Supports Minecraft **Java Edition 1.21.4 - 26.1**. ### Compatibility Incompatible with packs using the same filenames or editing ```assets/minecraft/items/totem_of_undying.json```. Semi-compatible with packs that modify the totem texture, meaning both packs will work but only the overworld texture will use the other pack's version. ### Add-Ons Feel free to use this pack as inspiration and/or a dependency for a datapack or mod (it would be cool to see the totem be given special abilities or effects depending on dimension)—**Don't just steal the textures and code, please link this pack as a dependency.** ### Patreon Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
